summary: First-iteration full-stack testing for Refixion. 23/23 backend pytest tests pass. Frontend homepage, 7-step booking wizard (Apple → iPhone 16 Pro Max → Screen → Workshop → Date/Time → Details → Confirm), and admin login/dashboard/bookings pages all work end-to-end. Booking RFX-A746C8 created and appeared in admin. SMTP not configured (as expected) — booking still succeeds.

issues: HTML <title> is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' — should be 'Refixion' or contextual per-page title in /app/frontend/public/index.html

action_items: Update <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html from 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to Refixion branded title.
Optional: reduce noisy 401 console errors from /api/auth/me polling on public pages (guard call when no token in localStorage).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py availability endpoint compares current time to slot time using naive .time() comparison across dates — the check `current.time() > (datetime.now() + timedelta(hours=1)).time()` is a subtle bug on same-day dates (when d == today) but works as expected for future weekdays because of the `d > now.date()` short-circuit. Consider simplifying to avoid confusion.
email_settings PUT returns 200 with empty smtp_password preservation logic — good; but GET blanks out password on read which is correct. No issue.

CORSMiddleware is added AFTER app.include_router(api). Currently CORS_ORIGINS='*' works with allow_credentials=True (starlette will echo origin) but cookies with SameSite=None + Secure require explicit origin whitelist in production.
server.py is ~700 lines — approaching the split threshold; consider splitting admin/public routers into modules.
Booking availability endpoint returns 200 with slots=[] for closed days but does NOT include 'closed: true' when the day is fully open with no slots left — inconsistent shape.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 bookings via automated tests (references RFX-*, first_name=TEST and TESTE2E). Left in DB — no cleanup needed since seed volumes are small.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py uses pytest+requests hitting REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Run sequentially with `pytest -n0` (xdist LoadScope may cause TestAdmin::test_update_booking_status to fail if TestBooking hasn't populated data yet). Wizard testids: wizard-brand-{slug}, wizard-device-{id}, wizard-repair-{id}, wizard-method-{slug} (workshop/mail-in/pickup/onsite — NOT 'premium-service-19' as in prompt), wizard-date-{iso}, wizard-time-{HH:MM}, wizard-input-{field}, wizard-consent, wizard-next-btn.
